summary.zh-CN: 提供 Codex 的 ChatGPT 付费方案，以及适合团队协作开发的工作区席位类型。
summary.en-US: Paid ChatGPT plans that expose Codex directly, plus workspace seat types for team coding workflows.

notes.zh-CN: 已于 2026-05-06 依据 OpenAI 定价页与 Help Center 交叉核对。OpenAI 对 Plus / Pro 的多数功能只公开“extended limits”或“unlimited access（受 abuse guardrails 限制）”口径，通常不会在定价页写死统一数值上限。当前列表仅统计订阅制或席位制方案，不包含按工作区 credits 计费的按量 seat。
notes.en-US: Cross-checked against OpenAI pricing and Help Center pages on 2026-05-06. OpenAI usually describes Plus / Pro feature access as extended limits or unlimited access subject to abuse guardrails, rather than publishing one fixed numeric quota on the pricing page. This list includes subscription and seat-based plans only, and excludes usage-based seats billed via workspace credits.

limits.zh-CN: 官网口径：消息、文件上传、数据分析、图片生成均为扩展额度；未公开统一数值上限

Claude publishes session-based capacity ratios for individual plans; Pro also has a session limit that resets every five hours plus a cross-model weekly limit. Enterprise differs from Team because API usage can be billed separately.

summary.zh-CN: 智谱面向 AI 编码场景提供的官方订阅套餐，当前公开为 Lite、Pro、Max 三档。
summary.en-US: Zhipu's official subscription plans for AI coding, currently published as Lite, Pro, and Max.

notes.zh-CN: 已于 2026-05-06 依据智谱开放文档《套餐概览》与《常见问题》核对。官方文档公开了套餐结构、5 小时/周限额和 MCP 额度，但静态页面未稳定公开统一价格，因此价格字段保留为以购买页为准。官方同时说明 Lite / Pro / Max 在限售期间会按每日 10:00（UTC+8）释放库存。
notes.en-US: Checked on 2026-05-06 against Zhipu's official Coding Plan overview and FAQ docs. The docs publish plan structure, 5-hour / weekly limits, and MCP quotas, but do not reliably expose one static public price on the docs pages, so pricing is left to the checkout page. The docs also note that Lite / Pro / Max inventory may be released daily at 10:00 UTC+8 during limited-sale periods.

limits.zh-CN: 约 80 prompts / 5 小时，约 400 prompts / 周；联网搜索 / 网页读取 / 开源仓库 MCP 合计 100 次 / 月
limits.en-US: About 80 prompts per 5 hours, about 400 prompts per week; 100 monthly combined calls for search / web-reader / open-repo MCPs

access.zh-CN: 支持 GLM-5.1、GLM-5-Turbo、GLM-4.7、GLM-4.5-Air，以及视觉理解、联网搜索、网页读取、开源仓库 MCP
access.en-US: Includes GLM-5.1, GLM-5-Turbo, GLM-4.7, GLM-4.5-Air, plus vision, web-search, web-reader, and open-repo MCP features

notes.zh-CN: 官方定位为编码套餐入门档，适用于官方支持的 Coding 工具环境。
notes.en-US: Officially positioned as the entry coding tier for supported coding tools.

limits.zh-CN: 约 400 prompts / 5 小时，约 2000 prompts / 周；联网搜索 / 网页读取 / 开源仓库 MCP 合计 1000 次 / 月
limits.en-US: About 400 prompts per 5 hours, about 2000 prompts per week; 1000 monthly combined calls for search / web-reader / open-repo MCPs

access.zh-CN: 包含 Lite 全部模型与 MCP 能力，并提供更高并发与更高编码额度
access.en-US: Includes all Lite models and MCP capabilities with higher throughput and larger coding quotas

notes.zh-CN: 官方文档将 Pro 作为高频复杂项目需求的主要升级档。
notes.en-US: The official docs position Pro as the main upgrade tier for frequent, more complex project work.

audience.zh-CN: 重度个人开发 / 多项目并发

limits.zh-CN: 约 1600 prompts / 5 小时，约 8000 prompts / 周；联网搜索 / 网页读取 / 开源仓库 MCP 合计 4000 次 / 月
limits.en-US: About 1600 prompts per 5 hours, about 8000 prompts per week; 4000 monthly combined calls for search / web-reader / open-repo MCPs

access.zh-CN: 包含 Pro 全部能力，并提供最高档的 prompt、MCP 与并发资源
access.en-US: Includes everything in Pro with the highest prompt, MCP, and concurrency capacity

notes.zh-CN: 官方文档说明并发与速率限制基本原则为 Max > Pro > Lite。
notes.en-US: The official docs state that concurrency and rate limits generally scale as Max > Pro > Lite.

summary.zh-CN: Google 同时提供个人免费的 Gemini Code Assist、Google AI Plus / Pro / Ultra 个人订阅，以及组织版 Standard / Enterprise；其中官方仅明确 Pro / Ultra 会提升 Code Assist / CLI 日请求上限。
summary.en-US: Google offers free Gemini Code Assist for individuals, Google AI Plus / Pro / Ultra personal subscriptions, and Standard / Enterprise organization editions; only Pro and Ultra are explicitly documented as raising Code Assist / CLI daily request limits.

notes.zh-CN: 已于 2026-05-06 交叉核对 Gemini Code Assist quotas 页、Gemini 官方 subscriptions 页和 Google Cloud Gemini 定价页。Code Assist / CLI 的精确日请求上限以 quotas 页为准；个人订阅价格与附加权益以 Gemini subscriptions 页为准。Google AI Plus 当前未在 Code Assist quotas 页中列为提升日请求上限的购买路径。
notes.en-US: Cross-checked on 2026-05-06 against the Gemini Code Assist quotas page, the official Gemini subscriptions page, and Google Cloud Gemini pricing. Exact Code Assist / CLI daily request limits come from the quotas page; personal subscription pricing and bundled benefits come from the Gemini subscriptions page. Google AI Plus is not currently listed on the Code Assist quotas page as a higher daily-limit purchase path.

limits.en-US: 1000 requests per user per day shared across Gemini Code Assist agent mode and Gemini CLI

limits.zh-CN: Code Assist 官方 quotas 页未将 AI Plus 列为更高日请求上限购买路径；未单独公布 Code Assist / CLI 提升额度

notes.en-US: Cross-checked on 2026-05-06 against the GitHub Copilot plans page and GitHub Docs plan tables. GitHub Docs says Copilot moves from request-based billing to usage-based billing on June 1, 2026; the docs also note paused new sign-ups for Pro / Pro+ / Student from April 20, 2026 and for some self-serve Business sign-ups from April 22, 2026.

The current official positioning is for individual developer use, with Lite and Pro tiers; enterprise-scale needs are directed to Ark model APIs. Live pricing and checkout terms should be taken from the activity / order page.

limits.zh-CN: 每 5 小时最多约 1200 次请求，每周约 9000 次，每订阅月约 18000 次请求
limits.en-US: Up to about 1200 requests per 5 hours, about 9000 per week, and about 18000 per subscription month

access.en-US: Supports tools such as Claude Code, Cursor, Cline, and Codex CLI

notes.zh-CN: 价格和优惠信息以活动页/下单页实时展示为准。
notes.en-US: Use the live activity / checkout page for current pricing and promotions.

notes.en-US: For enterprise-scale development, current official guidance points users to Ark model APIs.
